intro.title: RPAS Academy Introduction
intro.companyBody: We provide Canadian RPAS pilot study and mock-exam tools for Basic and Advanced certification prep.
intro.serviceBody: The platform includes course modules, question-bank practice, mock exams, result history, and post-submission answer explanations.
intro.courseBody: Courses are organized around TP-15263 knowledge areas: air law, flight operations, human factors, meteorology, navigation, airframes and systems, radiotelephony, and theory of flight.
intro.cta: Register to unlock free Basic content

examLaunch.title: Initiate Mock Examination

examLaunch.upgradeRequired: This content requires purchasing the full question bank.

learn.title: Study Center
learn.subtitle: Two courses · build from Basic to Advanced
learn.basicTagline: Foundational knowledge for the Basic operating environment.
learn.advancedTagline: The higher-risk delta: controlled airspace, ops near people, comms.
